part.text: In 2.3.4, `GetVariableInput` is an inline header helper that already returns `nullptr` before dereferencing when the input tensor index is negative, so the source `kernel_util.cc` null guard has no direct missing equivalent. The SVDF caller still needs the explicit `TF_LITE_ENSURE` before using `state`.
The SVDF hunk applies cleanly against the target base. I’m applying that minimal source change now.
